---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary
A concise description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
How would this work? Include API changes, new tools, or config changes.

## ADR Impact
Does this require a new Architecture Decision Record? Which existing ADRs does it touch?

## Alternatives Considered


## Additional Context
